highlights.text: I provided this dip buy to readers in yesterdays 4pm newsletter, writing: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into Friday afternoons Failed Breakdown which set the low we saw until today - this was a very classic example of the setup I trade every single day almost and its essential to see quality, real-time examples of it to learn.

post_title: Big Earnings Incoming. Will SPX Break Its Range? Oct 30th Plan
